svg.text: LithePG evidence — build_and_run pkill PATH-shadow hardening
Recorded 2026-06-01 14:17 EDT · synthetic fixture · no credentials, URLs, schemas, or result rows
test_build_and_run failed: build_and_run --print-bundle-path invoked PATH-shadowed pkill
script/build_and_run.sh defaults helper-owned cleanup to /usr/bin/pkill, not caller-controlled PATH.
script/test_build_and_run.sh shadows pkill in PATH and uses a safe absolute test override.
The test runs --print-bundle-path with fake Swift, so it does not open the app or kill real processes.
Independent reviews: spec PASS; quality/security APPROVED after the safe-pkill fixture fix.
